title: Mellow Nutty Dutch Peanut Satay
description: A nutty and shaggy Dutch dish featuring peanuts, oil, and dehydration, perfect for a vegan-friendly snack. This nostalgic treat is easy to make and delicious to eat.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the peanut oil, soy sauce, maple syrup, smoked paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, and salt.
Add the peanuts to the bowl and stir until they are evenly coated with the oil mixture.
Spread the peanuts out in a single layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Dehydrate the peanuts in the oven for 1 hour, stirring every 20 minutes.
Remove the peanuts from the oven and let them cool completely.
Once the peanuts are cool, break them up into smaller pieces and serve.
Store any leftover peanuts in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 5 days.
